name: INTELLIGENT PROTECTION MANAGEMENT CORP.
summary: Intelligent Protection Management Corp. (IPM) operates a secure private cloud through its data centers, providing cloud-based services and customer solutions. The company offers software, technology platforms, and managed services, relying on Microsoft Corporation and others for software licenses. IPM serves a limited number of customers and competes in the cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure industry.

products.name: Secure Private Cloud
products.description: A secure private cloud service operated through IPM's own data centers.

products.name: Customer Solutions
products.description: Software and technology solutions provided to customers, relying on Microsoft and other licensed intellectual property.

partnerships.description: IPM relies on Microsoft Corporation for software licenses and other intellectual property.
